chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 285 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 22-03-2023 Mr. Illahi Bux Maitlo, Advocate for the petitioner. M/s Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General and Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** It is an admitted position that the petitioner has availed simultaneously two remedies, one under Section 33 of the EOBI Act, 1976 against the order passed by the respondent No.6, which is still pending before the respondent No.2 and the other one is present petition. This fact has been concealed by the petitioner. Hence, this petition being not maintainable stands dismissed with cost of Rs. 10,000/- (Ten thousand), which shall be paid by the petitioner in the High Court Bar Library Fund within a week. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
